Setapp [...] Hey Product Hunt 👋 I'm Krijn, the founder of Lemni. Today, we're excited to introduce our beta, and we're making it available to everyone. Our team has been working hard to build a tool that lets you set up custom Ai agents for all your customer interactions. So you can effortlessly scale your business, without losing the personal touch. Here's what you can expect: ♾️ Agents — Set up custom Ai agents that can take action in your existing tools using just natural language and point and click. 📥 Inbox — Let human agents work together with Ai agents in a fully collaborative space, and set up approval rules to stay in the loop at all times. ✨ Knowledge — Train them on your business using drag and drop or website scraping. ⭐️ Behavior — Align them with your brand and purpose. ⚡️Actions — Use [...] Report

results.title: Soshi: Your AI social media manager for X | Product Hunt
results.content:
📖 What's Happened Since Then?  
  
The first feature we built not only won us the hackathon, but also got us a lot of love across platforms.  
  
Simply put, we automated the most popular growth strategy on X known as the "reply guy" strategy.

We built an AI agent that uses a computer just like a human, logging into your account, finding relevant people and posts, then writes replies in your voice, engaging with your ideal audience, while getting smarter over time.  
  
Then we decided to make our initial version free, and launched it 3 months ago on X:  
• 800+ users

• 10,000+ replies posted  
• Thousands of hours saved weekly  
• Engagement from OpenAI, Cursor, Browserbase, Supabase, and more

⚡️We're Launching Our V1 For X Today (TBA, will be announced later today!)

✅ Engage: [...] At the same time, I'd been rebuilding my personal brand from scratch on X and Threads. Previously, I've grown several accounts to 30-40K+ across platforms like TikTok and X. However, starting over reminded me how much of a grind it still is. Posting daily. Researching. Engaging. It takes up all your time, and when I looked into what the market had to offer, I was simply unsatisfied. They throw you a dashboard, a set of tools, and some analytics, then just expect you to figure it out.  
  
So we built Soshi. [...] Elijah Muraoka
Soshi

Soshi

@nicoleastor Hi Nicole! Haha we did make it free initially, but now we are -$20K and need to start monetizing 🤣 And yes, we are most definitely planning expansion in our roadmap. Our agent just needs to learn the nuances between each platform, but overall many social media platforms do have similar strategies. And as customizable as you want it to be, lol feel free to try it out yourself at noon PST!

Ash Grover

Congrats on the launch! This is definitely super useful for people to grow on X. Got any future plans for other social media platforms?

Elijah Muraoka
Soshi

Olly saves us precious time by auto-generating meaningful and relevant comments on social media. Comments can be customized based on your brand voice. And you don't have to connect your social media account for Olly to work! Olly's AI credits are already very affordable, but good to know that BYOK is available as an option. Yash and his team are very responsive and new features are regularly being shipped. That's why this gets my recommendation and 5-star rating! ✨🚀👍

I'm not sure if it's the user interface or my own understanding, but I can't seem to locate the option to automate comments for my social media accounts. The app has a lot of potential, but if I have to manually manage it in real time, it won't meet my needs.

Mike

Website, store, app, SEO, blog, social, support, and sales automation from one description — ambitious scope. The question is whether "AI agents keep working behind the scenes" holds up in practice or just sounds good on a landing page. 🤔

Report

Faty

Maker

@t9p Fair point, it does sound like a lot. In practice, it’s not one system doing everything perfectly. It’s multiple small agents handling specific, repeatable tasks and keeping things moving in the background. You stay in control they just save you from doing the same work over and over.

Report

Hey Product Hunt 👋 I'm Symo, founder of Devaito.

I ran a digital agency for years. Every week, someone walked in with a brilliant idea. They needed a website, a brand, a store, an app, SEO, marketing. I'd quote them weeks of work and thousands of dollars. I'd watch their face drop.

I didn't lose clients. I lost believers.
